# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: PASS

**Test:** Clickjacking: page cannot be embedded in iframe from different origin
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:42.850Z
**OWASP Category:** API8:2023 - Security Misconfiguration

## Description

Cross-origin iframe embedding was blocked; clickjacking protection verified.
